summary: Compares approaches to mixed-member proportional across systems, analyzing German model, compensatory seats, overhang seats.
key_points: Different countries adopt varying approaches to mixed-member proportional.
Comparative analysis reveals: German model, compensatory seats, overhang seats.
Institutional context shapes how this factor operates in practice.
Reform efforts draw on lessons from other jurisdictions.
No single model dominates; contextual fit matters.
